claims.statement: Panama Canal length is larger than Suez Canal length.
claims.explanation: Sources: USGS/NOAA/CTBUH/UNESCO and other references. Panama Canal length: 82 km. Suez Canal length: 193 km.

claims.statement: Speed of sound in air (~20°C) is slower than Brisk walking.
claims.explanation: Sources: NOAA/engineering references (values rounded). Speed of sound in air (~20°C): 1235 km/h. Brisk walking: 5 km/h.

claims.statement: Lærdal Tunnel length is at least 2× longer than Panama Canal length.
claims.explanation: Sources: UNESCO/Britannica/national agencies (values rounded). Lærdal Tunnel length: 24.51 km. Panama Canal length: 82 km.

claims.statement: There are fewer known chemical elements than bits in a byte.
claims.explanation: Sources: standards & reference values. 118 elements vs 8 bits.

claims.statement: Wikipedia launched happened before Telephone patented.
claims.explanation: Sources: widely documented dates. Wikipedia launched: 2001. Telephone patented: 1876.
